name: Deluxe Grilled Chicken Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Breast of chicken, cut into strips
1 medium Red bell pepper, sliced thin
4 oz Monterey Jack or mozzarella cheese, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the chicken breast in batches until browned on all sides.
2. Sprinkle with garlic powder, salt, pepper, and taco seasoning. Stir to coat evenly.
3. Add sliced peppers and onion. Continue sautéing until the vegetables are tender and the chicken is no longer pink inside.
4. Butter one side of each sesame seed bun. Place in a preheated toaster oven for 3 minutes, or until butter is melted and buns are lightly toasted.
5. Remove the toasted buns from the oven and divide the chicken mixture evenly among them.
6. Top each sandwich with grated cheese. Return to the toaster oven and bake until the cheese has bubbled and begun to brown (about 2-3 minutes).
7. Serve with cucumber spears.
